collections.name: Mad Lads
collections.description: Mad Lads are a collection of 10,000 dynamic NFTs on the Solana blockchain, built by the Backpack team. Holders gain access to the Backpack ecosystem and exclusive drops.

collections.name: SMB Gen2
collections.description: SMB is a collection of 5,000 unique randomly generated SolanaMonkeys stored on the blockchain. Reject humanity, return to monke.

collections.name: SMB Gen3
collections.description: The next generation of Solana Monkey Business. 5,000 unique monkeys with enhanced art and utility, building on the legacy of the original SMB collection.

collections.name: Famous Fox Federation
collections.description: A collection of 7,777 foxes building the Famous Fox Federation — a community-driven ecosystem on Solana with staking, raffles, and governance.

collections.name: Claynosaurz
collections.description: Claynosaurz is a collection of 10,000 hand-crafted clay dinosaurs on Solana. A vibrant community with gaming, merchandise, and ecosystem partnerships.

collections.name: Claynosaurz: Call of Saga
collections.description: Call of Saga is the Claynosaurz companion collection — 2,000 saga-themed clay dinosaurs with unique lore and utility within the Claynosaurz ecosystem.

collections.name: Taiyo Robotics
collections.description: Taiyo Robotics features 2,348 unique robots on Solana, combining Japanese-inspired design with DeFi utility and community rewards.

collections.name: Galactic Gecko
collections.description: Galactic Gecko Space Garage is a collection of 10,000 unique geckos on Solana, known for their staking rewards and community-driven initiatives.

collections.name: little swag world
collections.description: little swag world is a collection of 3,333 characters on Solana, featuring unique pixel art and a focus on community, creativity, and vibes.

collections.name: Quekz
collections.description: Quekz is a collection of 5,000 WNS NFTs on Solana with enforced royalties via transfer hooks. A community-driven collection of quirky characters.

collections.name: Quekz
collections.description: Quekz is a collection of 5,000 WNS NFTs on Solana with enforced royalties via transfer hooks. A community-driven collection of quirky characters.

collections.name: Hot Heads
collections.description: Hot Heads is an exclusive collection of unique 1/1 hand-drawn characters on Solana, each with its own personality and story.

collections.name: DeGods
collections.description: DeGods is a digital art collection on Solana. A deflationary collection of degenerates, punks, and misfits. DUST. Season III.

collections.name: Degen Ape Academy
collections.description: Degen Ape Academy is a collection of 10,000 randomly generated, unique apes on the Solana blockchain. One of the OG Solana NFT collections.

collections.name: Sensei
collections.description: Sensei is a Metaplex Core collection on Solana featuring unique characters with martial arts themes and community-driven utility.

collections.name: Dead King Society
collections.description: Dead King Society is a curated collection of 1/1 art pieces on Solana, featuring royal characters with dark, gothic aesthetics.

collections.name: Okay Bears
collections.description: Okay Bears is a culture shift. A collection of 10,000 bears on the Solana blockchain, bringing Web3 to the mainstream with premium art and partnerships.

collections.name: Frogana
collections.description: Frogana is a collection of 5,555 pNFTs on Solana. Frogs taking over the blockchain, one hop at a time.
